message:
fix(fcp-core): include canonical CBOR header in operation signable bytes

Refactor OperationIntent::signable_bytes() and OperationReceipt::
signable_bytes() to include the full canonical-CBOR-encoded ObjectHeader
instead of just created_at timestamp. This makes the signature cover
the complete header metadata (zone_id, schema, provenance, foreign_refs)
preventing header mutation after signing.

Extract append_len_prefixed_bytes(), append_optional_string(), and
append_canonical_header() helpers for deterministic byte encoding.
Update validate_receipt_intent_binding() to accept receipt_id and
intent_id parameters for cross-reference validation.

Update all golden test vectors with new signable_bytes_hex values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
